input.new_string:
Concrete.productEquiv
    (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → ι => F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))))

/-- **Homology-to-exactness reduction** (the `Ab`-side of `lem:section_cech_ab_exact`):
the degree-`(q+1)` homology of the section {\v C}ech complex vanishes once the
underlying group homomorphisms of the two consecutive coface differentials
`objD q`, `objD (q+1)` form an exact sequence.  Pure homological algebra: combines
`exactAt_iff_isZero_homology`, `exactAt_iff'`, and the abelian-group exactness
criterion `ShortComplex.ab_exact_iff_function_exact`. -/
lemma sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact {ι : Type u}
    (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X) (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (q : ℕ)
    (h : Function.Exact
      (ConcreteCategory.hom (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q))
      (ConcreteCategory.hom
        (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) (q + 1)))) :
    IsZero ((sectionCechComplex U F).homology (q + 1)) := by
  rw [← HomologicalComplex.exactAt_iff_isZero_homology,
      (sectionCechComplex U F).exactAt_iff' q (q + 1) (q + 2) (by simp) (by simp),
      ShortComplex.ab_exact_iff_function_exact]
  have hf : (sectionCechComplex U F).d q (q + 1)
      = AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q :=
    CochainComplex.of_d _ _ (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.d_squared _) q
  have hg : (sectionCechComplex U F).d (q + 1) (q + 2)
      = AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) (q + 1) :=
    CochainComplex.of_d _ _ (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.d_squared _) (q + 1)
  show Function.Exact
      (ConcreteCategory.hom ((sectionCechComplex U F).d q (q + 1)))
      (ConcreteCategory.hom ((sectionCechComplex U F).d (q + 1) (q + 2)))
  rw [hf, hg]
  exact h

end SectionCechBridge

{\v C}ech coface differential `objD q`, read through the product equivalence, is the

the cosimplicial structure of `sectionCechCosimplicial`; no sheaf identification yet. -/
lemma sectionCech_objD_apply {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (q : ℕ)
    (t : ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial U F).obj (SimplexCategory.mk q)))
    (σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι) :

        (ConcreteCategory.hom

              (fun l => iInf_le _ ((SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom l)))).op)

  simp only [sectionCechProductEquiv, Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply,
    AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD]
  sorry

end SectionCechBridge

/-- Application of a finite sum of `Ab`-morphisms distributes over the sum. -/
private lemma ab_hom_finsetSum_apply {A B : Ab.{u}} {κ : Type*}
    (s : Finset κ) (f : κ → (A ⟶ B)) (t : ToType A) :
    ConcreteCategory.hom (∑ i ∈ s, f i) t = ∑ i ∈ s, ConcreteCategory.hom (f i) t := by
  classical
  induction s using Finset.induction with
  | empty => simp
  | insert a s ha ih =>
      rw [Finset.sum_insert ha, Finset.sum_insert ha, AddCommGrpCat.hom_add_apply, ih]

/-- **(c2, abstract) Coface match**: the underlying group action of the section
{\v C}ech coface differential `objD q`, read through the product equivalence, is the
alternating sum of the presheaf restriction maps applied to the deleted-face
coordinates — exactly the shape of `SectionCechModule.dDiff`.  This is purely about
the cosimplicial structure of `sectionCechCosimplicial`; no sheaf identification yet. -/
lemma sectionCech_objD_apply {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (q : ℕ)
    (t : ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial U F).obj (SimplexCategory.mk q)))
    (σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι) :
    sectionCechProductEquiv U F (q + 1)
        (ConcreteCategory.hom
          (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q) t) σ
      = ∑ i : Fin (q + 2), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
          ConcreteCategory.hom
            (F.presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_iInf
              (fun l => iInf_le _ ((SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom l)))).op)
            (sectionCechProductEquiv U F q t (σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom)) := by
  classical
  simp only [sectionCechProductEquiv, Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply]
  rw [← ConcreteCategory.comp_apply, AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD,
      Preadditive.sum_comp, ab_hom_finsetSum_apply]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ => ?_)
  rw [Preadditive.zsmul_comp, AddCommGrpCat.hom_zsmul, AddMonoidHom.smul_apply]
  congr 1
  have hmap : (sectionCechCosimplicial U F).map (SimplexCategory.δ i) ≫ Pi.π _ σ
      = Pi.π _ (σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom)
        ≫ F.presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_iInf
            (fun l => iInf_le _ ((SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom l)))).op :=
    Pi.lift_π _ σ
  rw [CosimplicialObject.δ, hmap, ConcreteCategory.comp_apply]

private lemma ab_hom_finsetSum_apply {A B : Ab.{u}} {κ : Type*}
    (s : Finset κ) (f : κ → (A ⟶ B)) (t : ToType A) :

  | empty => simp
  | insert a s ha ih =>
      rw [Finset.sum_insert ha, Finset.sum_insert ha, AddCommGrpCat.hom_add_apply, ih]

/-- **(c2, abstract) Coface match**: the underlying group action of the section
{\v C}ech coface differential `objD q`, read through the product equivalence, is the
alternating sum of the presheaf restriction maps applied to the deleted-face
coordinates — exactly the shape of `SectionCechModule.dDiff`.  This is purely about
the cosimplicial structure of `sectionCechCosimplicial`; no sheaf identification yet. -/
lemma sectionCech_objD_apply {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (q : ℕ)
    (t : ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial U F).obj (SimplexCategory.mk q)))
    (σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι) :
    sectionCechProductEquiv U F (q + 1)
        (ConcreteCategory.hom
          (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q) t) σ
      = ∑ i : Fin (q + 2), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
          ConcreteCategory.hom
            (F.presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_iInf
              (fun l => iInf_le _ ((SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom l)))).op)
            (sectionCechProductEquiv U F q t (σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom)) := by
  classical
  simp only [sectionCechProductEquiv, Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply]
  rw [← ConcreteCategory.comp_apply, AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD,

    Pi.lift_π _ σ

/-- Application of a finite sum of `Ab`-morphisms distributes over the sum. -/
private lemma ab_hom_finsetSum_apply {A B : Ab.{u}} {κ : Type*}
    (s : Finset κ) (f : κ → (A ⟶ B)) (t : ToType A) :
    ConcreteCategory.hom (∑ i ∈ s, f i) t = ∑ i ∈ s, ConcreteCategory.hom (f i) t := by
  classical
  induction s using Finset.induction with
  | empty => simp

/-- The `i`-th section {\v C}ech face restriction at a multi-index `σ` of the
cosimplicial section object: the presheaf restriction of `F` from the deleted-face
intersection `⨅ₗ U (σ (δ i l))` to the full intersection `⨅ₖ U (σ k)`.  Factored as a
named `def` so the cosimplicial differential (`sectionCech_objD_apply`) refers to it
by name rather than re-elaborating the `homOfLE (le_iInf …)` term. -/
noncomputable def sectionCechFaceRestr {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) {q : ℕ} (σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι) (i : Fin (q + 2)) :
    F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ l, U ((σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom) l)))
      ⟶ F.presheaf.obj (Opposite.op (⨅ k, U (σ k))) :=
  F.presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_iInf
    (fun l => iInf_le _ ((SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom l)))).op

/-- **(c2, abstract) Coface match**: the underlying group action of the section
{\v C}ech coface differential `objD q`, read through the product equivalence, is the
alternating sum of the presheaf restriction maps applied to the deleted-face
coordinates — exactly the shape of `SectionCechModule.dDiff`.  This is purely about
the cosimplicial structure of `sectionCechCosimplicial`; no sheaf identification yet. -/
lemma sectionCech_objD_apply {ι : Type u} (U : ι → TopologicalSpace.Opens X)
    (F : X.PresheafOfModules) (q : ℕ)
    (t : ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial U F).obj (SimplexCategory.mk q)))
    (σ : Fin (q + 2) → ι) :
    sectionCechProductEquiv U F (q + 1)
        (ConcreteCategory.hom
          (AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD (sectionCechCosimplicial U F) q) t) σ
      = ∑ i : Fin (q + 2), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
          ConcreteCategory.hom (sectionCechFaceRestr U F σ i)
            (sectionCechProductEquiv U F q t (σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom)) := by
  classical
  simp only [sectionCechProductEquiv, Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply]
  rw [← ConcreteCategory.comp_apply, AlternatingCofaceMapComplex.objD,
      Preadditive.sum_comp, ab_hom_finsetSum_apply]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun i _ => ?_)
  rw [Preadditive.zsmul_comp, AddCommGrpCat.hom_zsmul, AddMonoidHom.smul_apply]
  congr 1
  have hmap : (sectionCechCosimplicial U F).map (SimplexCategory.δ i) ≫ Pi.π _ σ
      = Pi.π _ (σ ∘ (SimplexCategory.δ i).toOrderHom) ≫ sectionCechFaceRestr U F σ i :=
    Pi.lift_π _ σ
  rw [CosimplicialObject.δ, hmap, ConcreteCategory.comp_apply]

underlying group map of the categorical projection `Pi.π … σ`.  A definitional

  Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply _ y σ

# AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/CechAcyclic.lean

## Session summary (iter-021, Lane 2 — P3 L1 steps c+d)
- Added the import `AlgebraicJacobian.Cohomology.PresheafCech` (no cycle: PresheafCech does
  not import CechAcyclic).
- Built **5 new axiom-clean declarations** forming the complete *abstract* categorical→module
  homology bridge that the blueprint's steps (c1)–(c3) call for. All compile at **default
  heartbeats** (the initial 1M-heartbeat cost was eliminated by factoring the face restriction
  into a named `def`, see `sectionCechFaceRestr`).
- File sorry count: **1 before → 1 after** (only the pre-existing, superseded
  `CechAcyclic.affine` relative-form sorry at line ~75, left as-is per objective).
- Blocked on: the **tilde F-bridge** (per-coordinate section identification through the
  `toPresheafOfModules` presheaf accessor) — the one genuinely deep remaining ingredient.

## Declarations added (all `#print axioms` = {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound})

1. `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCechProductEquiv` (def) — **(c1)** the
   `Concrete.productEquiv` for the degree-`p` object `∏ᶜ_σ F(⨅ₖ U(σ k))` of
   `sectionCechCosimplicial`: `ToType(∏ᶜ F_σ) ≃ ∏_σ ToType(F_σ)`.
2. `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCechProductEquiv_apply` (lemma) — coordinate projection of (1)
   = `ConcreteCategory.hom (Pi.π _ σ)`; a `rw`-friendly restatement of
   `Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply` (the bare lemma will NOT `rw`/`simp` here because the
   argument's type is in `.obj`-form, not syntactic `∏ᶜ` — see Dead-ends).
3. `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCechFaceRestr` (def) — the `i`-th section Čech face restriction
   `F(⨅ₗ U(σ(δ i l))) ⟶ F(⨅ₖ U(σ k))`. **Factored as a named def precisely to keep the
   `sectionCech_objD_apply` statement cheap** (inlining the `homOfLE (le_iInf …)` term made the
   statement cost >1M heartbeats / time out).
4. `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCech_objD_apply` (lemma) — **(c2, abstract) coface match**: the
   underlying group action of the `objD q` differential, read through `sectionCechProductEquiv`,
   is `∑ᵢ (-1)ⁱ • (faceRestr i) (productEquiv (σ ∘ (δ i).toOrderHom))`. Purely cosimplicial; **no
   sheaf identification** — exactly the abstract shape of `SectionCechModule.dDiff`.
5. `AlgebraicGeometry.sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact` (lemma) — **(c3) reduction**:
   `IsZero (homology (q+1))` follows from `Function.Exact` of the underlying maps of the two
   consecutive `objD` differentials. Pure homological algebra via
   `exactAt_iff_isZero_homology` + `exactAt_iff'` + `ShortComplex.ab_exact_iff_function_exact`.

Plus one private helper: `ab_hom_finsetSum_apply` (application of a finite sum of Ab-morphisms
distributes over the sum — `AddCommGrpCat.hom_add_apply` induction).

## Status per blueprint sub-lemma
- `lem:section_cech_product_equiv` (c1): **RESOLVED** (decl 1; the per-σ identification with
  `dCoeff` is part of the still-open tilde wiring, not the equiv itself).
- `lem:section_cech_coface_match` (c2): **abstract part RESOLVED** (decl 4). The blueprint's
  fully-wired `sectionCechCofaceMatch` (= decl 4 + restriction=`dCoface` via
  `qcohRestriction_eq_comparison`) needs the tilde F-bridge below.
- `lem:section_cech_ab_exact` (c3): **reduction RESOLVED** (decl 5); the exactness input it
  consumes is provided by the assembly below.
- `lem:section_cech_homology_exact` / `lem:cech_acyclic_affine` §section form
  (`sectionCech_affine_vanishing`, step d): **NOT ADDED** — blocked on the tilde F-bridge.

## The exact remaining assembly (precise handoff)

The homological skeleton is finished. To land `sectionCech_affine_vanishing` for `F = tilde M`:

**(A) Per-coordinate AddEquiv + square — THE blocker.** For each multi-index `σ`, an
`AddEquiv  φ_σ : ToType (F.presheaf.obj (op (⨅ₖ U(σ k)))) ≃+ SectionCechModule.dCoeff s M σ`
(both localise `M` at `Submonoid.powers (sprod s σ)`; canonical by `IsLocalizedModule`
uniqueness — `qcohSectionsAwayLocalized` + `basicOpen_sprod`), AND the naturality square
`φ_σ ∘ (sectionCechFaceRestr U F σ i) = dCoface s M m σ i ∘ φ_{σ∘(δ i).toOrderHom}`
(from `qcohRestriction_eq_comparison`).

  **Why blocked**: `sectionCechCosimplicial` reads sections via
  `((toPresheafOfModules (Spec R)).obj G).presheaf.obj (op V) : Ab`, whereas the proved
  tilde lemmas speak of `(AlgebraicGeometry.tilde.toOpen M (D g)).hom` and
  `(modulesSpecToSheaf.obj (tilde M)).presheaf.obj`. These are **three distinct presheaf
  accessors** that must be reconciled (the `toPresheafOfModules` underlying-Ab presheaf vs the
  `modulesSpecToSheaf`/`tilde.toOpen` ModuleCat sections). That reconciliation is the one piece
  of genuinely new infrastructure still missing. Confirmed via scouting:
  `modulesSpecToSheaf : (Spec R).Modules ⥤ TopCat.Sheaf (ModuleCat R) …` (ModuleCat-valued),
  `toPresheafOfModules : X.Modules ⥤ X.PresheafOfModules` (Ab-presheaf-valued).

**(B) Ladder transport — mechanical once (A) is in hand.** Use
`Function.Exact.of_ladder_addEquiv_of_exact` (`Mathlib.Algebra.Exact.Basic`):
  - `e_p := (sectionCechProductEquiv …).toAddEquiv` ▸ `∏_σ φ_σ`  (degreewise AddEquiv
    `ToType(obj (mk p)) ≃+ (∀ σ, dCoeff s M σ)`),
  - `f` = `SectionCechModule.dDiff s M (q+1)`, `(q+2)` (as `→+` via `.toAddMonoidHom`),
  - `g` = `ConcreteCategory.hom (objD …)` (as `→+`),
  - the two commuting squares come from `sectionCech_objD_apply` (decl 4) + (A)'s square,
  - `H` = `SectionCechModule.dDiff_exact s M hs (q)` (already proved, step (a)).
  This yields `Function.Exact (objD-hom q) (objD-hom (q+1))`, which feeds decl 5
  (`sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact`) to close `IsZero (homology (q+1))`.

**(C) The named target.** Per the blueprint, a *general* quasicoherent `F` additionally needs
Stacks 01I8 (`F ≅ tilde (Γ F)`), a separate deferred gap; the gap-free target is `F = tilde M`.

## Dead-ends / warnings for the next prover
- Do NOT inline the face restriction `F.presheaf.map (homOfLE (le_iInf …)).op` into a lemma
  *statement* — it triggers a `whnf` heartbeat blow-up (>1M, times out even at 4M when combined
  with a proof). Always go through the named `sectionCechFaceRestr`.
- `Concrete.productEquiv_apply_apply` will neither `rw` nor `simp` against the section objects:
  the argument's type is `ToType ((sectionCechCosimplicial …).obj (mk p))`, NOT syntactic
  `ToType (∏ᶜ …)`, so the family `?F` cannot be unified. Use the named
  `sectionCechProductEquiv_apply` instead (proved by defeq term-mode).
- `ConcreteCategory.comp_apply` is **`rfl`** for `Ab`; use `show … from rfl` to convert
  `hom g (hom f x)` ⇄ `hom (f ≫ g) x` when `rw [← comp_apply]` fails on the `obj`-vs-`∏ᶜ`
  defeq mismatch.

  AddMonoidHom.smul_apply]`.

  align decl 4's `(δ i).toOrderHom` with `dDiff`'s `succAbove` in (A)/(B)).
